training/train_eval.py.notes: select_target (374 LOC) extracted; process_model + _call_train_evaluate_with_configs stay in parent since they couple to trainer; parent below 600 LOC target after dead-stub removal.

training/helpers.py.notes: get_training_configs (729 LOC) extracted in one move; lazy torch/lightninglib imports preserved inside the sibling.

training/neural/flat.py.notes: MLPTorchModel LightningModule (510 LOC) extracted; class identity preserved through parent re-export so isinstance keeps working.

training/core/_phase_train_one_target_bo.reason: Single 878-LOC function _train_one_target with deeply nested loop body and many closure-captured locals. Pure carve would require FitState dataclass refactor (real refactor, not behavioural-only); risk to suite training path is high. Documented in monoliths-split.md plan; under 1000 LOC so not currently flagged by the meta-test.

training/core/_main_train_suite.py.reason: Same shape as _phase_train_one_target_body: single 829-LOC function (train_mlframe_models_suite) with sequential phase calls. Carving requires per-phase context dataclass; under 1000 LOC so not currently flagged.

training/composite_discovery.py.reason: Single 727-LOC class CompositeTargetDiscovery; method-rebinding pattern (same as _composite_target_estimator). Under 1000 LOC so not currently flagged.

meta_test.notes: Test is intentionally failing per spec: 'Exempt list пуст. Если есть — fail с list paths.' The five offenders are W6 deferred items (C1#1, C1#6, C1#7, C1#18, plus _ensembling_score that grew since). Orchestrator decides whether to keep CI gate or dispatch follow-up carve waves.

test_results.cross_module_import_smoke: All 15 carved modules import cleanly; cross-module re-exports verified

summary.total_loc_dropped: 3757 LOC from parents -> 1899 LOC across parents (-1858 LOC)
